productName: Dungeness Dank - CRAB CLAWS 0.5g Infused Joint Packs - Parking Lot Kush - 1g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Parking Lot Kush, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — an earthy, piney, hashy aroma and a classic, relaxing feel, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
